Detention<ref name="EG">{{StoryCite|story=End Game|book=Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|bformatted=''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' novelization, 2012 edition}}</ref> '''Camp Six''' was a temporary camp of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], established near [[Harte Secur]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]<ref name="SW:GB" /> during the Federation's [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|occupation]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="NEC" /> The base consisted of a [[Command center]] and two [[Barracks/Legends|troop centers]], and was protected by four [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser turrets]]. [[Fambaa/Legends|Fambaas]] were captured to be skinned and sold.<ref name="SW:GB" /> The camp was visited by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] to meet with one of the [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]], [[Leika]], to find information about the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]], a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] on Naboo.<ref name="EG" /> Camp Six was [[Liberation of Harte Secur|destroyed]] by [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] and the [[Gungan Grand Army/Legends|Gungan Grand Army]] prior to the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Grassy Plains]], in order to free the fambaas and use them in the battle.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Camp Six appears during the Gungan campaign in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''.<ref name="SW:GB" /> The campaign was also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''</ref> The camp also appears in the [[2012]] short story "[[End Game]]," written by [[James Luceno]] and included in the re-release of the [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|novelization]] of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]''.<ref name="EG" />''
